titleStmt.title: SII 27.190: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 190. (A.R. No. 310 of 1931-32.) ĀVARŚE, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This slightly worn out record registers gift of lands for worship, offerings and burning a perpetual lamp in the maṭha at Kīrāḍi by Chimma-seṭṭi. [Vōbha]ḷarāja-voḍeya is stated to have been ruling Bārakūru-rājya.
It is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Śrāvaṇa ba. 1, Sunday coreesponding to 1544 A.D., August 3, Sunday f.d.t. ·02.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ nirvighnamastu . śuklāṁbaradharaṁ viṣṇuṁ sasivaṁrnnaṁ caturbhujaṁ . prasaṁna
vadanaṁ dhyāyētsarvvavighnōpaśāṁtayē . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhave . svasti jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1466 krōdhi saṁvatsarada
śrāvaṇamāsa bahuḷa 1 Ādivāradalū śrīmatu śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīra
mahāpratāpa sadāśivamahārāyaru vijeyanagariya siṁhāsanadalū jeysi druṣṭanigraha śrēṣṭa
pratipālaneyāgi halli sukhasaṁtōsadalū rājyavanāḷuva kāladalū Avara nirūpadalū bāra
kūra siṁhāsanavanū Āḷuva vōbhaḷarāja voḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanāḷu kāladalū kirāḍi
yoḷage bārābaḷiya Akkamāḍiya maga jiṁmaseṭṭimāḍida dharṁmayirsida dēvapūjege śāsa
nadalu barada bāḷa vivara maṭada dēvapūjeya tera maṭadiṁda mūḍalu mallagade bīja mu 3 ho
samaṭa makke mu 4 �yo bāḷa catusīme vivara mūḍalu hoḷeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalū teṁkalū kartara hu
ṭṭina braṁhmastānadiṁda baḍagalū paḍuvalū saṁkameyana mallagadeyiṁda mūḍalū baḍagalū
harida bacaliṁda teṁkalu �yo catusīme voḷage yī taḷadamēle kālake dēvarige naḍa
va naṁdādīvige 1 kārtikamāsada toḷasi pūje sōṇeyatiṁgaḷa cauti hōmake
kraya hosamaṭadalu gaṁ 85 Akkimu 15 Allinaṭa sasi Āluba saha dēvarige kartara huṭṭina
braṁhmadāyada voḷu bayalu tāriyagade nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 3 garikanagade bayalu
nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 2¢ Ā bayala kūḍaṇamakki nāgaṁḍugadalu bīja mu 3 gaṇa
darana makki maṭṭi gade nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 2 gāṇiṁ Akki mu 2 hulla Akki kauta mallagade
mu 1 tiṁmayakellali maṭlameke mu 1 gēṇi Akki mu 2 [ālli Aba] saha ma baḷi
baḷi gade nāgaṁḍugadalū mu 3 kke gēṇi Akki mu 2 yidake cattu sīme mūḍalu �yosara
senabōvana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalū teṁkalū hārugalliṁdaṁ baḍagalū paḍuvalū mū
muda makkeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalū baḍagalū bara bacaliṁdaṁ teṁkalū yiṁtī nālku cattu
sīme Oḷage bāḷumaki mallagade Asaba teṁgu Aḍakemara halasu māu yēnuḷaṁttada sahā
ma mūḍamakke mu 4 Alliya catussīme mūḍalu tāṁi kaṁbaḷiya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu
teṁkalu kārara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalū paḍuvalū ṭhakūrara gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalū ba
baḍagalu tegara Agaḷiṁda teṁkalū nālku catussīme Oḷagegarama Āluba saha mu 4 kke gēṇi
4 kariyagade mu 15 gēṇi Akki mu 40 catusīme vivara mūḍalu ṭhakurara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalū te
ṁkalū hugiya hola huḷiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalū ṭhakurara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu ba
ḍagalū garikana gadeyiṁ teṁkalu yilu catussīme Oḷage caliyagade mu 1¢ Ā gēṇi mu 4Read yi nālku.
matta hosagade mū 5 keḷagaṇa tārigade mu 2 na mallagade maki mu 3 Ubegade mu 10 teru
kaḷa mu 16 Ā bāḷamēle Ā kartaramēle sikida Ā yisida taḷa na
ḍana Akkimu 3 ṇa gade bayalalu mu 3 keya bayalu koḷake gade mu 3 hari
mallagade mu 12 yiḷivagade Uḷa ra saha mu 1¢ bayalu mu 4 gēṇi
teṁka bayalū mu 2 gēṇi Ā mu 6 U
damaged
Amrutapaḍi
ṇiya dharṁmake mu 20 tuppake Aṣṭami pūje mu 1 śivarātri pūje
1 purāṇa Uratige mu 1 . Ā catra dharṁmake
ya maṭake sahā
Āṇi yeṁ
damaged
balage naḍava Akki rmu
damaged
ṇa senabōvaramaga tiṁmaya sēnabōvaru
Digital edition of SII 27.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
